projects.title: Gulshan loft
projects.headline: A north-facing living room that finally feels warm
projects.description: The brief was simple and brutal: the room never got direct light. We solved it with layered warm-toned lighting and a material palette that holds heat visually even in grey hours.
projects.image_alt: Spacious modern great room at dusk with curved sectional sofas, a round dark coffee table, and a sculptural brass pendant light

projects.title: Banani studio offices
projects.headline: An open-plan space built for focus, not just photos
projects.description: For a 40-person tech team, we designed acoustic zoning into the furniture layout itself, so quiet and collaborative work could share one floor without headphones.
projects.image_alt: Modern open-plan studio office with acoustic zoning and natural light

projects.title: Dhanmondi boutique
projects.headline: A small footprint that reads twice its size
projects.description: At 38 square metres, every fixture had to earn its place. Mirrored sightlines and a single accent material gave the store a sense of depth without remodeling the shell.
projects.image_alt: Elegant marble-clad living space with gold trim, a sliding feature wall, and an open staircase beyond
